title: MoreBricks
body:
# **MoreBricks**
[
![](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/game-versions/morebricks?label=Available%20for)
](https://modrinth.com/mod/morebricks) [
![](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/morebricks)
](https://modrinth.com/mod/morebricks)

-------
### **About**
Hello, players! Have you ever thought Minecraft doesn't have enough stone bricks? Here we are!

This mod adds Granite, Diorite, and Andesite bricks stairs, and slabs.

If you have issues, questions, or feedback, you can tell me [here](https://github.com/PunJarrr/MoreBricks/issues), I'm welcome to get feedback.

-------
### **Installation**
**Fabric**
- [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/) and [Fabric API](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) are required

-------
### **Credit**
All textures from [VanillaTweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net) resource pack.
